name: Cedar Inc.
description:
[TW: Themes of non-consensual dronification, potentially general BSDM stuff, etc. If there is more I should add to this list please comment what should be added.]

-

Work at Cedar Incorporated! Do whatever you want, you can be a janitor, a drone, an executive, etc. Don’t do anything you probably shouldn’t do though…

You could also just wander around outside, The city is a big place after all.

Takes place in Boston, Massachusetts. The year is 2032

-

Some inspiration was taken from Hacony/Qundium, however as of lately I do not support them. Therefore, there will be no credit (no art is being taken either, so what’s the point?)

Nullbulge template stolen from Mayexper (See ya in two years)

Art by AGuySomewhere on e6

Roadmap for this bot:

[REASON: Fuck you I hate Hacony. Also optimization]

[REASON: Optimization]

✅ = Finished

❔ = Unsure of adding

❌ = Cut/Cancelled

Warning: Copying my bots and claiming that the bot is yours (whether it be on this platform or off this platform) is a dick headed move. Be polite, please. Modifying is allowed, but keep it private.
